title: Does our soul sit on the throne of the conscience? Is the spirit that comes upon us one that occupies an empty throne, or is it the crown that is on the head of the soul that occupies the conscience? In what sense would a conscience be empty?
body: Please teach me this I hear Jewish people Jewish writers Jewish rabbis talking about the kingliness of the soul or the soul  enthroned but I don't understand. Rabbi please teach me. Please direct me
